<noinclude>
Add a new set of Host Guest interaction experiments (a table in which each row describes one investigation):
{{#forminput:form=Host Guest interaction experiments}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>
{{{for template|Host Guest interaction experiments}}}
experiments:
{{{field|experiments|holds template}}}
{{{end template}}}

{{{for template|Host Guest interaction|multiple|embed in field=Host Guest interaction experiments[experiments]}}}
{| class="formtable"
! host:
| {{{field|host|input type=combobox|property=Host|values from url=molecule_lookup_host}}}
| host concentration [{{#defaultQuantity:property=Host concentration|form=Host_Guest_interaction_experiments}}]:
| {{{field|host conc|input type=regexp|property=Host concentration|base type=Number|message=Input a positive number|regexp=/^([0-9]*\.)?[0-9]*(\s+(M|mM|µM)?)?$/}}}
|-
! guest:
| {{{field|guest|input type=combobox|property=Guest|values from url=molecule_lookup_guest}}}
| guest concentration [{{#defaultQuantity:property=Guest concentration|form=Host_Guest_interaction_experiments}}]:
| {{{field|guest conc|input type=regexp|property=Guest concentration|base type=Number|message=Input a positive number|regexp=/^([0-9]*\.)?[0-9]*(\s+(M|mM|µM)?)?$/}}}
|-
! cofactor:
| {{{field|cofactor|input type=combobox|property=Cofactor|values from url=molecule_lookup_cofactor}}}
| cofactor concentration [{{#defaultQuantity:property=Cofactor concentration|form=Host_Guest_interaction_experiments}}]:
| {{{field|cofactor conc|input type=regexp|property=Cofactor concentration|base type=Number|message=Input a positive number|regexp=/^([0-9]*\.)?[0-9]*(\s+(M|mM|µM)?)?$/}}}
|-
! guest-host-ratio [SolvA/SolvB]:
| {{{field|guest_host_ratio|label=guest-host-ratio|input type=string}}}
|-
! Ka [1/mol]:
| {{{field|ka|input type=regexp|property=Ka|base type=Number|message=Input a positive number|regexp=/^([0-9]*\.)?[0-9]*(\s+(V)?)?$/}}}
| LogKa
| {{{field|logka|input type=regexp|property=LogKa|base type=Number|message=Input a positive number|regexp=/^([0-9]*\.)?[0-9]*(\s+(V)?)?$/}}}
|-
! Kd [mM]:
| {{{field|kd|input type=regexp|property=Kd|base type=Number|message=Input a positive number|regexp=/^([0-9]*\.)?[0-9]*(\s+(V)?)?$/}}}
|-
! Temperature [° C] (can be range):
| {{{field|temperature|label=Temperature [° C]|input type=regexp|regexp=^[+-]?([0-9]*[.])?[0-9]+$}}}
|-
! DeltaG [kJ/mol]:
| {{{field|deltaG|input type=regexp|property=DeltaG|base type=Number|message=Input a positive number|regexp=/^([0-9]*\.)?[0-9]*(\s+(V)?)?$/}}}
|-
! Detection type:
| {{{field|detection_type|input type=dropdown|property=Detection type}}}
|-
! Assay type:
| {{{field|assay_type|input type=dropdown|property=Assay type}}}
|-
! Technique:
| {{{field|technique|input type=dropdown|property=Technique}}}
|-
! include:
| {{{field|include|input type=checkbox|property=Include}}} (check it when you want to include this investigation on topic pages)
|-
|}
;Details:
{{{field|details|input type=textarea|property=Details|message=Arbitrary extra information}}}
{{{end template}}}

{{{standard input|save}}} {{{standard input|preview}}} {{{standard input|changes}}} {{{standard input|cancel}}}
</includeonly>
